name: Sentry
one_liner: Sentry provides error tracking and application performance monitoring software for developers.

evidence.claim: Sentry provides a public REST API for programmatic access to the platform.
The REST API uses Bearer token authentication.
Developers can create internal integrations in their Sentry settings to get API tokens for free.

access_notes: Developers can create internal integrations or personal auth tokens directly from their account settings to access the API for free.
mcp_notes: Sentry provides an official MCP server for agent-based access to the platform.
api_notes: The REST API provides extensive control over Sentry resources including organizations, teams, issues, events, releases, and monitoring.
auth_notes: The API supports Bearer tokens (via personal auth tokens or internal integrations), OAuth2 (for public integrations), and JWT (for specific authorization flows).
